ui.meta.game_settings.video_memory_usage:

ui.meta.game_settings.vsync.description: Aligns the game's frame rate with your monitor's refresh rate to prevent screen tearing and ensure smoother visuals.
ui.meta.game_settings.motion_blur.descri: Applies a blur effect to fast-moving objects and camera movements for a smoother cinematic feel.
ui.meta.game_settings.upscaler_quality_f: Adjusts the trade-off between image clarity and performance.#br#Higher settings deliver near-native visuals, while lower settings prioritize higher frame rates.
ui.meta.game_settings.upscaler_quality_d: Adjusts the trade-off between image clarity and performance.#br#Higher settings deliver near-native visuals, while lower settings prioritize higher frame rates.#br#*NVIDIA DLAA* maximizes image quality through an AI-based anti-aliasing technique. DLAA uses the same Super Resolution technology developed for DLSS, reconstructing a native resolution image to maximize image quality.
ui.meta.game_settings.upscaler_quality_x: Adjusts the trade-off between image clarity and performance.#br#Higher settings deliver near-native visuals, while lower settings prioritize higher frame rates.
ui.meta.game_settings.auto_adjust_upscal: Automatically fine-tunes the selected upscaling quality (DLSS, FSR, XeSS) based on your display resolution for optimal performance and image clarity.
ui.meta.game_settings.frame_generation.d: Frame Generation boosts frame rates by using AI to render additional frames. 2X is supported on a GeForce RTX 40 Series graphics card or higher, while 3X and 4X are supported on a GeForce RTX 50 Series graphics card.
ui.meta.game_settings.reflex.description: NVIDIA Reflex Low Latency reduces PC latency and increases responsiveness. This feature requires a GeForce graphics card.
ui.meta.game_settings.upscaler_type.desc:
Selects the upscaling method to use. Available options depend on your hardware configuration. #br#*AMD FSR 2*: AMD FidelityFX Super Resolution 2 is a cutting-edge temporal upscaling algorithm that produces high-resolution frames from lower-resolution inputs (favors quality over performance).

#br#*NVIDIA DLSS Super Resolution*: Boosts frame rates by rendering fewer pixels and using AI to output high-resolution frames. This feature requires a GeForce RTX graphics card.

#br#*Intel XeSS*: Intel Xe Super Sampling (XeSS) technology uses machine learning to deliver higher performance with exceptional image quality.

#br#*Off*: Disables upscaling and relies on native rendering with Temporal Anti-Aliasing (TAA), which may result in significantly lower performance with little to no visible quality improvements compared to *Ultra Quality* upscaling.
ui.meta.game_settings.dynamic_resolution: Automatically adjusts the internal rendering resolution to maintain the selected frame rate.#br#When GPU load increases, the resolution is reduced to preserve performance. When performance headroom is available, the resolution scales back up to improve image clarity.#br#Works in combination with AMD FSR, NVIDIA DLSS, and Intel XeSS. Disabled when rendering natively with TAA.#br#Operates independently of V-Sync.
ui.meta.game_settings.frame_rate_limit.d: Limits the maximum frame rate the game can render.#br#Setting a cap can improve frame pacing, reduce power consumption, and lower system heat.#br#Operates independently of Dynamic Resolution and V-Sync.

vo_hq_brief_conquest_01.phrase_2: Multiple hot zones identified across the area of operations.
vo_hq_ftue_0_1: HQ to all units. Mission is search and destroy. Neutralize all hostiles, secure the facility.
vo_pc_ftue_1_5_chopper: Base secured! Let's clear out the hostiles.
vo_hq_ftue_1_7: Phase one complete. Move in to the facility. Sweep and clear.
vo_pc_ftue_1_8_chopper: Kent, flank the enemy. Buy us time.
vo_ally_ftue_1_9_kent: I'll pull their attention. Use the opening.
vo_pc_ftue_2_1_chopper: The place is empty. Something's off.
vo_ally_ftue_2_2_hound: They hit this facility for a reason.
vo_ally_ftue_2_5_hound: I’m out. Go on without me.
vo_pc_ftue_3_2_chopper: Enemy retreated. Don't let them escape.
vo_hq_ftue_2_7: Eliminate that target, Chopper. But watch out: advanced ordnance confirmed.
vo_pc_ftue_2_8_chopper: Copy that. I've never seen a gun like that before.
vo_hq_ftue_outro_02: Full debrief at base. Over and out.
vo_ally_ftue_tut_modules_hound: Aim for the modules, that's where it hurts.
vo_hq_ftue_tut_gatling: Chopper, they're close enough for your Gatling gun.
vo_hq_ftue_tut_aps: Chopper, block those shots with your APS!
vo_hq_ftue_tut_creeping: Chopper, hit it with your Creeping Barrage!
vo_hq_ftue_tut_capture: Chopper, stay inside the yellow perimeter to capture a base.
vo_hq_ftue_tut_scope: Chopper, use the right click to activate your scope.
vo_pc_ftue_intro_chopper_01_e: But fear still settles in the chest.
vo_pc_ftue_intro_chopper_01_f: The same way it always has.
vo_pc_ftue_intro_chopper_03_b: To remind me what all this power is meant to protect.
vo_hq_ftue_intro_05: All callsigns, confirmed advanced weapons systems.
vo_pc_ftue_intro_chopper_06: Emergency landing! How hot is the drop zone?
vo_pc_ftue_outro_chopper_03_c: Using weapons we've never seen before.
vo_pc_ftue_outro_chopper_03_e: But they will come back stronger.
vo_pc_ftue_outro_chopper_04_a: But we’ll keep fighting for a better tomorrow.
vo_pc_ftue_outro_chopper_04_b: As many times as it takes.
vo_flair_s01intro_3: I remember how quiet it got…
vo_flair_s01intro_5: Beauty takes time and preparation, fren.
vo_flair_s01intro_6: Life shouldn't have to fight this hard to grow…
vo_flair_s01intro_11: No more little ones fading into silence.

reactive_systems_modifier.prefab.reactiv: +7% to Energy *regeneration speed* and -7% to *cooldown*. Allows all abilities to be used more frequently.
s_reactive_systems_skill.prefab.s_reacti: +7% to Energy *regeneration speed* and -7% to *cooldown*. Allows all abilities to be used more frequently.
s_tactical_calibration_skill.prefab.s_ta: +15% to ability *projectile effectiveness*, including ATGM turn speed and Slow applied by Suppressive Fire.
tactical_calibration_modifier.prefab.tac: +15% to ability *projectile effectiveness*, including ATGM turn speed and Slow applied by Suppressive Fire.
s_last_stand_skill.prefab.s_last_stand_s: Reduces incoming damage to leave the vehicle with a maximum of 4% HP instead of 1 HP.
s_never_say_die_skill.prefab.s_never_say: *+30%* to status decay speed while Relentless is active.
s_fuel_the_flames_skill.prefab.s_fuel_th: Ultimate abilities charge *15%* faster (*+15%* bonus to all actions and passive gain).
s_lingering_inferno_skill.prefab.s_linge: *+20%* to the duration of napalm puddles left by the *Napalm in the Morning* Ultimate.
well_oiled_machine_modifier.prefab.well_: *+10%* to hull and turret traverse speed.
combat_blur_system_modifier.prefab.comba: *-20%* to reticle size, including while moving.
e_flamethrower_effect.prefab.e_flamethro: Damaging an enemy with an ability makes them Fragile.
e_comet_effect.prefab.e_comet_effect.bas: Using abilities that boost your tank's speed above *45 km/h* applies Warded to you.
e_well_oiled_machine_effect.prefab.e_wel: *+10%* to hull and turret traverse speed.
c_second_wind_conditional.prefab.c_secon: On kill, *restocks* the main gun magazine.
combat_rhythm_modifier.prefab.combat_rhy: *-5%* to reload time for each ability on cooldown.
energy_recycler_modifier.prefab.energy_r: *+1 Ultimate Energy* for every *5 Energy* spent on abilities.
overclocked_modifier.prefab.overclocked_: *-25%* to ability cooldown, but *-10%* to ability damage.
well_oiled_machine_modifier.prefab.well_: *+10%* to hull and turret traverse speed.
s_slow_n_steady_skill.prefab.s_slow_n_st: *+10%* to turret rotation speed and aiming speed when moving *under 33km/h*.
slow_n_steady_modifier.prefab.slow_n_ste: *+10%* to turret traverse speed and aiming speed when moving at under *33 km/h*.
e_killer_modifier_effect.prefab.base_abi: *+10%* to all weapon damage for *5 s* after each critical hit dealt.
killer_algorithm_modifier.prefab.killer_: *+10%* to all weapon damage for *5 s* after each critical hit dealt.
s_killer_algorithm_skill.prefab.s_killer: *+10%* to all weapon damage for *5 s* after each critical hit dealt.
code_injection_modifier.prefab.code_inje: *+15%* to all statuses applied by the vehicle.
s_code_injection_skill.prefab.s_code_inj: *+15%* to all statuses applied by the vehicle.
patch_uplink_modifier.prefab.patch_uplin: Grants Overdrive and Warded for *10 s* after removing a status effect.
s_patch_uplink_skill.prefab.s_patch_upli: Grants Overdrive and Warded for *10 s* after removing a status effect.
execution_protocol_sm.prefab.execution_p: NBC Protection can be used twice in a row before going on cooldown.
s_execution_protocol_skill.prefab.s_exec: NBC Protection can be used twice in a row before going on cooldown.
payload_amplifier_modifier.prefab.payloa: *-25%* to time between Strike Laser pulses.
s_payload_amplifier_skill.prefab.s_paylo: *-25%* to time between Strike Laser pulses.
e_signal_dominance.prefab.e_signal_domin: *+50%* to duration of pulse area created after destroying a target with Strike Laser.
s_signal_dominance_skill.prefab.s_signal: *+50%* to duration of pulse area created after destroying a target with Strike Laser.
c_unseen_fighter_conditional.prefab.c_un: *+10%* to damage dealt by shots fired while Masked.
show_goes_on_slot_spawn.prefab.show_goes: *+50%* to Slow resistance and instantly repairs damaged tracks.
concealed_impact_modifier.prefab.now_you: Enemies you hit do not see a damage direction indicator.
e_dont_blink_effect.prefab.e_dont_blink_: *-1 s* to time to switch between main tank and proxy.
plan_b_modifier.prefab.plan_b_modifier.b: *-5%* to main gun reload time for each ability on cooldown.
gas_gas_gas_modifier.prefab.gas_gas_gas_: *+0.5 Ultimate Energy* per second while boosting.
escape_protocol_smoke_modifier.prefab.es: Releases a Smoke cloud with a *10 m* radius around the vehicle after dropping below *25%* HP.
deja_vu_modifier.prefab.deja_vu_modifier: *+100%* to track HP and *+50%* to Slow resistance while drifting.
a_air_gunship_camera_ability.prefab.A_ai: Call in the assistance of an AC-130H Specter gunship, equipped with a 40mm autocannon and a limited amount of ammunition for its precision 105mm gun. Take control of its weapon systems and deliver their firepower to where it's needed most.
a_emp_rakete_ability.prefab.a_emp_rakete: The Agent loads a slow-moving missile into the vehicle's gun. The missile can jam nearby opponents and has detection capabilities that slow it down when in proximity to an enemy vehicle. It detonates with a delay shortly after contact with an obstacle, or can be manually triggered to create a large shock explosion.
a_creeping_barrage_ability.prefab.a_cree: Call in a moving barrage of HE shells from an off-map artillery battery.
crippling_impact_modifier.prefab.crippli: Shell hits on enemies increase their track repair time by *10%* for *10 s*.
a_stubborn_ability.prefab.a_stubborn_abi: Take reduced damage and receive additional protection while capturing objectives.
echo_shield_modifier.prefab.echo_shield_: After expiring, Warded is granted again for *10 s*.  Cooldown: *30 s*
underdogs_guard_modifier.prefab.underdog: *+1* stack of Warded when the enemy team is winning.
a_grand_slam_ability.prefab.a_grand_slam: Call in an aircraft to drop a massive unguided bomb that penetrates objects and detonates underground, pushing enemies back in its blast wave.
adrenaline_rush_modifier.prefab.adrenali: *+1 Ultimate Energy* for every *250* damage dealt with the main gun.
maximum_impact_modifier.prefab.maximum_i: *+10%* to Ultimate damage, but *-2 m* to Ultimate radius.
a_juggernaut_ability.prefab.a_juggernaut: Bulldoze through objects and enemy vehicles, pushing them into—or out of—harm's way and clearing placed mines.
rhinoceros_modifier.prefab.rhinoceros_mo: *+10%* to ramming damage when moving at over *25 km/h*.
a_disruptive_influence_device_mana_check: Exceeding an Energy threshold recodes the vehicle's electronic signature, hiding it from enemy HUDs until you fire.
a_echo_proxy_ability.prefab.a_echo_proxy: Deploy a proxy of your tank with identical parameters and modules, and switch between the two to throw enemies off the scent.
a_nbc_protection_ability.prefab.a_nbc_pr: A decontamination system removes all status effects from the vehicle as soon as they are applied.
a_strike_laser_ability.prefab.a_strike_l: Direct an airborne laser designator at a target vehicle to make it Warded, emitting pulses that deal damage to enemies around it over time.
a_iron_curtain_ability.prefab.a_iron_cur: Deploys a drone swarm that boosts allies' shields and repair rate and grants immunity to status effects.
a_tank_tinkerer_ability.prefab.a_tank_ti: Damaging Gambit Jams the attacker. Closer hits Jam harder.
a_hunters_eye_ability.prefab.a_hunters_e: Aiming at an enemy for a short time reveals their critical zones.
shattered_modifier.prefab.shattered_modi: *+5%* to damage while Hunter's Eye is active.
exposed_modifier.prefab.exposed_modifier: Reveals critical zones on enemy vehicles as soon as they are spotted.
a_hunting_time_ability.prefab.a_hunting_: Launch and guide a TV missile that destroys marked lower-HP enemies and Traces others. Each destruction recharges the Ultimate for a short time.
Destroying an enemy with Hunting Time makes targets around them Fragile as well as Traced.
sure_shot_slot_spawn_modifier.prefab.sur: Destroying an enemy with Hunting Time makes targets around them Fragile as well as Traced.
a_contracted_strike_ability.prefab.a_con: Lock on to enemies directly in front of your vehicle for a missile strike: a short lock fires Hydra rockets, while an extended lock launches a homing Hellfire missile.
charge_retention_modifier.prefab.charge_: Canceling Contracted Strike reduces its charge amount to *33%* instead of 0%.
time_management_modifier.prefab.time_man: Reduces minimum lock-on time for a Hydra strike from *1.5 s* to *1.2 s* and extends lock-on after stopping targeting from *2.5 s* to *3.5 s*.
a_rising_tempo_trait_ability.prefab.a_ri: Base reload time is increased, but landing hits on enemies progressively reduces it.
gunslinger_modifier.prefab.gunslinger_mo: Rising Tempo increases base reload time by *7.5%* instead of *12.5%*.
lawman_modifier.prefab.lawman_modifier.b: *+25%* to aiming speed for each stack of Rising Tempo.
a_vigilant_trait_ability.prefab.a_vigila: The Agent reveals enemies' *ability and ultimate status* by *looking* at them.
combat_experience_modifier.prefab.combat: The Agent gains -10% to reload time after using their Trait on a target.
target_stability_modifier.prefab.target_: The Trait aims with a cone instead of using gun aiming.
a_rampage_ability.prefab.a_rampage_abili: Enter a destructive rage to fire faster and survive any hit with at least 1 HP.
e_bloodlust_effect.prefab.e_bloodlust_ef: *-35%* to reload time between shells in the magazine when Scavenge is active.
a_scavenge_trait_ability.prefab.a_scaven: Destroyed enemy vehicles drop Scrap Tokens, which can be picked up to gain temporary HP.
c_mass_to_energy_conditional.prefab.mass: *+10* to Boost Energy capacity and *+5%* to Boost Energy regeneration speed for every collected Scrap Token until destruction.
c_metal_resistance_conditional.prefab.c_: Picking up a Scrap Token provides *100% resistance to Daze and Interference for 20s*.
c_rational_distribution_conditional.pref: *+50%* to HP restored by Scrap Tokens.
c_last_stand_token_conditional.prefab.c_: Grants Warded for *10 s* on picking up a Scrap Token.
a_blast_projection_ability.prefab.a_blas: The Agent charges the cannon and blasts forward with incredible energy. Any target within range in front of the vehicle takes damage and becomes irradiated.
a_napalm_in_the_morning_ability.prefab.a: Control a targeting pod on a circling F-4 Phantom II and direct a napalm strike from a bird's-eye view.
fuel_the_flames_modifier.prefab.fuel_the: Ultimate abilities charge *15%* faster (*+15%* bonus to all actions and passive gain).
lingering_inferno_modifier.prefab.linger: *+20%* to the duration of napalm puddles left by the *Napalm in the Morning* Ultimate.
a_relentless_trait_ability.prefab.relent: Protects the vehicle from being destroyed with a single shot, provided it has sufficient HP.
last_stand_modifier.prefab.last_stand_mo: Reduces incoming damage to leave the vehicle with a maximum of 4% HP instead of 1 HP.
never_say_die_effect.prefab.never_say_di: *+30%* to status decay speed while Relentless is active.
never_say_die_modifier.prefab.never_say_: *+30%* to status decay speed while Relentless is active.
a_daredevil_ability.prefab.a_daredevil_a: Reload faster while boosting, gain Boost Energy while drifting, and take less fall damage.
a_pulse_generator_ability.prefab.a_pulse: Deploy a drone with an EMP bomb to follow your tank and Slow nearby enemies over time. The EMP can be launched before it detonates, damaging and Jamming enemies.
close_quarter_emp_effect.prefab.close_qu: *+25%* to damage dealt by Lights Out explosions.
e_paralyzing_quickening_effect.prefab.e_: *+20%* to Lights Out EMP radius and *-50%* to the explosion damage it deals to your vehicle.
a_demolition_charges_ability.prefab.a_de: Launch two high-explosive rockets in a ballistic arc to deal heavy damage and Slow enemies.
a_minefield_ability.prefab.a_minefield_a: Deploy a minefield to stall enemies by damaging and Immobilizing them.
a_aps_ability.prefab.a_aps_ability.cw.Ab: Protect yourself and allies with a force field that blocks incoming shells.
a_autoturret_ability.prefab.a_autoturret: Deploy an auto turret with a rotary cannon to shred close-range enemies.
a_gatling_gun_ability.prefab.a_gatling_g: Switch fire mode to the Gatling machine gun on top of the tank and unleash a barrage of small-caliber rounds to overwhelm lightly armored targets.
a_gatling_gun_automatic_ability.prefab.a: Switch fire mode to the Gatling machine gun on top of the tank. The weapon can unleash a barrage of small-caliber rounds to overwhelm lightly armored targets.
a_blast_projectors_ability.prefab.a_blas: Concussion charges beneath the appliqué armor produce a high-pressure blast wave around the vehicle, severely damaging nearby enemies but destroying the vehicle's own armor in the process. The explosion can be charged longer for more damage, but overcharging will cause additional damage to the vehicle and tracks.
a_energized_plating_ability.prefab.a_ene: Boost the electric current to internal systems to massively improve armor plating effectiveness and track protection.
a_canister_volley_ability.prefab.a_canis: Load a canister shell, effective at close range.
a_manual_emergency_aps_ability.prefab.a_: Deploy an emergency shield to protect the vehicle from the next incoming high-caliber shell.
a_autoturret_ability.prefab.a_autoturret: Activate an auto turret that fires a burst of HE shells at enemies in your field of view, damaging tracks and Slowing them.
a_recon_probe_ability.prefab.a_recon_pro: Launch up to 3 probes to detect enemies within a set radius. Targets within the line of sight will be Traced for all allies.
a_laser_designator_ability.prefab.a_lase: Use high-precision laser targeting to Trace an enemy and make them Vulnerable.
a_tow_atgm_ability.prefab.a_tow_atgm_abi: Switch to powerful TOW missiles that punch through thick enemy armor and set targets on Fire on penetration.
a_capacitor_discharge_ability.prefab.a_c: The Agent discharges the capacitor in an effort to disrupt nearby opponents. Friendly vehicles receive a bonus.
a_support_unit_ability.prefab.a_support_: The Agent places a support unit on the battlefield that sets Repairing on nearby friendly vehicles.
a_aerial_radar_passive_ability.prefab.a_: Passively spots and marks all aerial targets.
a_los_f_h_air_defense_ability.prefab.a_l: Activate the vehicle's missile launchers and prepare them to engage unarmored targets, including aerial threats. After a short preparation time, the vehicle can target multiple enemies simultaneously, provided they remain in view while the missiles fly toward them. In this mode, the missiles have reduced penetration but increased speed, and deal splash damage.
a_mim_146_missiles_ability.prefab.a_mim_: Activate the vehicle's missiles and prepare them for anti-tank use. After a short preparation time, the vehicle can launch several ATGMs at targets with increased penetration but slow projectile speed.
a_dirty_substance_ability.prefab.a_dirty: Launch Grease to coat nearby terrain, making it harder to traverse and Slowing enemies caught in it.
a_grenade_cluster_ability.prefab.a_grena: Launch a cluster of grenades that detonate instantly on impact with an enemy or after a delay on the ground.
a_fastdraw_secondary_magazine_ability.pr: Switch to a different loader to fire specialized shells for an alternative combat approach.
a_unload_ability.prefab.a_unload_ability: Refill the main gun loader and rapidly unload it in a devastating burst.
a_charge_ability.prefab.a_charge_ability: Launch your tank forward at high speed to ram into enemies and force them out of position.
a_suppressive_fire_ability.prefab.a_supp: Utilize dual .50-cal machine guns that automatically target enemies, dealing damage and Slowing them.
machinegun_01_gun.prefab.machinegun_01_g: A rapid-firing gun that allows for sustained low-damage suppression fire.
Press to switch to alternate fire mode.
Hold to fire rounds from ammo belt until it runs out.
a_incendiary_charges_ability.prefab.a_in: Turret-mounted launchers fire grenades in a ballistic arc. On impact, each leaves a Napalm area that sets enemies on Fire. The Napalm area also emits smoke columns that block enemies' line of sight and Thermal Vision.
a_line_charges_ability.prefab.a_line_cha: The vehicle is briefly Immobilized as its turret-mounted launchers fire a pair of charges in a ballistic arc. After a short delay, a detonation sequence triggers along the projectile paths, dealing explosive damage, damaging tracks, and Slowing enemies.
a_airburst_ability.prefab.a_airburst_abi: Load an anti-tank guided missile and direct it to a target, where its proximity fuze detonates and leaves a Fire area.
a_autocannons.prefab.a_autocannons.cw.Ab: Take control of dual high-velocity 20 mm cannons to penetrate thick armor at close range with a high rate of fire.
Hunt the enemy down and leave them with nowhere to run: all vehicles' thermal tracks become visible in sniper mode.
a_thermal_vision_hero_ability.prefab.a_t: The Agent can use superior optics to activate Thermal Vision, allowing for observation of Masked targets. It also reveals targets hidden by smoke.
a_self_siege_mode_ability.prefab.A_self_: Massively increases firepower. Takes *3s* to deploy. Vehicle is immobile while Siege mode is active. Can be deactivated by pressing the ability button again.
a_top_attack_ability.prefab.a_top_attack: Lock on to an enemy to mark it for a top-attack missile strike. If there are multiple Traced tanks in the area, you can target up to 2 of them.
a_uav_drone_ability.prefab.a_uav_drone_a: Launch a UAV drone that scouts the area and Traces enemy targets.
a_decoy_hero_ability.prefab.a_decoy_hero: Place a decoy that mimics your tank's current state, including its HP. Any damage to the decoy destroys it and Traces the attacker.
a_trapping_shot_shell_ability.prefab.a_t: Make the next shot a trapping one that Immobilizes the target, then triggers a chain of explosions around them.
a_deadzone_gerat_ability.prefab.a_deadzo: Place poles on the map to create a deadzone in which opponents receive negative effects. When the poles are destroyed, they release a shock that damages and stuns opponents.
a_vampyr_drone_ability.prefab.a_vampyr_d: Deploy a drone that can absorb Energy from an enemy vehicle and transfer it to a friendly vehicle or itself for repairs. Control the drone's movement to direct it as needed. Enemies can destroy the drone by dealing damage to it, and it is also susceptible to environmental damage from status and world effects.
a_guard_drone_ability.prefab.a_guard_dro: Deploy a drone that can absorb Energy from an enemy vehicle and transfer it to a friendly vehicle or itself for repairs. The player controls the drone's movement, directing it as needed. Enemies can destroy the drone by dealing damage to it, and it is also susceptible to environmental damage from status and world effects.
a_vampyr_drone_one_target_ability.prefab: Deploy a drone capable of restoring HP to the Leopard 1A1 and allied vehicles, while also dealing shock damage to enemy vehicles. Control the drone's movement to direct it as needed. Enemies can destroy the drone by dealing damage to it, and it is also susceptible to environmental damage from status and world effects.
a_electro_optical_jammers_ability.prefab: Activate jamming devices that interfere with enemy targeting systems, reducing their accuracy at range.
a_feign_death_ability.prefab.a_feign_des: Disguise your vehicle as a battlefield wreck to mislead enemies and become Masked until firing.
a_smart_mines_ability.prefab.a_smart_min: Deploy an autonomous smart mine at a target location that fires at nearby enemies, dealing damage and applying 3 Fragile stacks, or maximizing stacks on targets that are already Fragile.
a_suppression_strike_ability.prefab.a_su: Switch to high-explosive anti-tank guided missiles that apply 2 Fragile stacks on hit, or maximize stacks on targets that are already Fragile.
a_advanced_camouflage_system_ability.pre: Enter a near-invisible state, evading enemy spotting and targeting until you fire or use EMP Trap. Movement or proximity to enemies reduces your concealment.
a_emp_trap_ability.prefab.a_emp_trap_abi: Place an EMP mine that detonates on contact with an enemy, damaging and Slowing them before emitting pulses that further damage and Slow enemies in range.
a_bastion_ability.prefab.a_bastion_abili: Place a ballistic shield in front of your vehicle to protect against incoming shells.
a_jamming_field_ability.prefab.a_jamming: Deploy an Interference field that Jams nearby enemies' electronics.
a_pyrotrail_ability.prefab.a_pyrotrail_a: Burst forward at high speed, leaving a burning trail that ignites enemies and terrain.
a_rocket_barrage_ability.prefab.a_rocket: Unleash a salvo of high-explosive rockets that damage and Slow enemies.
a_disruption_field_generator_ability.pre: A magnetic field strong enough to distort longer EM wavelengths. Laser rangefinders return erroneous data to targeting computers, diminishing the effectiveness of many weapon systems.
a_tesla_discs_ability.prefab.a_tesla_dis: Gambit deploys levitating Tesla Discs from his turret-mounted disc sling. These gadgets float on the battlefield and generate damaging energy pulses at regular intervals.
a_harpoon_boost.prefab.a_harpoon_boost.c: Launch an Immobilizing harpoon to pull your vehicle toward an enemy or point within a certain range.
a_scrap_barricade.prefab.a_scrap_barrica: Deploy hedgehogs around the vehicle to trap enemies. Ramming the hedgehogs damages them, while activating the ability again destroys them instantly.
a_deploy_dozer_ability.prefab.a_deploy_d: The *BAT-4M* redirects power from the vehicle engine to support and defense sub-systems. Deployed armor is impenetrable to incoming fire. #br#All *combat engineering* abilities have their applied effects doubled.
a_repair_welder_ability.prefab.a_repair_: Ready the *BAT-4M* crane boom to provide support to allied players. #br#Holding *Left Mouse Button* cycles the crane's repair function, repairing damage and applying *Warded*. Holding *Right Mouse Button* cycles the crane's Energy transfer function, providing Energy to an allied vehicle and reducing its ability cooldowns.
a_self_repair_passive_ability.prefab.a_s: PASSIVE #br#Repairs your vehicle after not taking damage for 10s.
a_air_strike_ability.prefab.A_air_strike: An offensive operation carried out by attack helicopters.
air_strike_ability_t62.prefab.a_air_stri: Send attack helicopters to carry out a strike that deals *750*–*850* AoE damage. Unleash the whirlybirds!
air_strike_ability_t62_two_passes.prefab: Send attack helicopters to carry out a strike that deals *750*–*850* AoE damage. Unleash the whirlybirds!
a_smoke_mortar_ability.prefab.A_smoke_mo: Launch smoke rounds to conceal your unit from enemy observation.
smoke_mortar_ability_t62.prefab.a_smoke_: Deploy smoke rounds that provide ninja-like concealment from enemy observation for *20s*.
exhaust_vail_ability.prefab.exhaust_vail: Creates a smoke screen behind the vehicle.
Extinguishes Fire areas, removes Burning, and accelerates Fire status decay.
Creates a smoke screen behind the vehicle, hiding it from view.
fail_safe_circuit_ability.prefab.fail_sa: A circuit that automatically detects and removes any status effects on the vehicle, restoring its mobility.
Clears all active status effects and resets buildup of all statuses.
Automatically detects and removes status effects from the vehicle.
hull_reinforcement_kit_ability.prefab.a_: Temporarily provides the vehicle with extra HP that depletes over time.
After 1 s, temporary HP starts to deplete at 25 HP/s.
Temporarily grants the vehicle extra HP that depletes over time.
phantom_curtain_ability.prefab.phanton_c: Launches a smoke screen in front of the vehicle, hiding it from view.
Extinguishes Fire areas, removes Burning, and accelerates Fire status decay.
Launches a smoke screen in front of the vehicle, hiding it from view.
phantom_curtain_charged_ability.prefab.p: Launches a smoke screen in front of the vehicle, hiding it from view.
Extinguishes Fire areas, removes Burning, and accelerates Fire status decay.
Launches a smoke screen in front of the vehicle, hiding it from view.
rebuild_kit_ability.prefab.rebuild_kit_e: Repairs start at *50 HP* and increase exponentially over time.
Single-use kit that restores HP over time and repairs shields.
recovery_protocol_ability.prefab.recover: When activated, removes active status effects from the vehicle and restores its tracks.
Removes all active status effects and resets status buildup.
Removes status effects from the vehicle and restores its tracks.
recovery_system_ability.prefab.recovery_: Gradually repairs the vehicle if it avoids taking damage for a set time.
Starts restoring *100 HP/s* after 10 s without taking damage.
Taking damage interrupts the repair process.
Gradually repairs the vehicle if it avoids taking damage for a set time.
Taking damage interrupts the repair process.
teps_ability.prefab.teps_equipment.cw.Eq: *-50%* to duration of applied status effects
Increases resistance to status effects, making them harder to apply and reducing their duration.

Caution: weak spot! Sufficient lethal damage to the electronics will jam the vehicle, preventing the use of abilities that require electrical power. The duration and susceptibility can be reduced by increasing the vehicle's Jammed resistance.
Caution: weak spot! Extremely vulnerable to critical hits.
Caution: weak spot! Vulnerable to critical hits. A destroyed fuel tank sets the vehicle on fire. The duration and susceptibility can be reduced by increasing the vehicle's fire resistance.

Caution: weak spot! Sufficient lethal damage to the crew will jam it, preventing use of the main gun and weapon-based abilities. The duration and susceptibility can be reduced by increasing the vehicle's Jammed resistance.

Hit points (HP) represent the amount of damage a vehicle can sustain in combat. When a vehicle's HP reaches zero, it is destroyed.
A conditional resource used to activate Boost mode, which gives the vehicle a temporary burst of speed.
A conditional resource used to activate a vehicle ability.
A conditional resource used to activate an Agent's Ultimate.
Keeps vehicles spotted for a set time. Traced targets are clearly marked to opponents, even through obstacles, and cannot become Masked. Can be removed by entering a Smoke area.
Time taken to load a shell into the vehicle's gun. May vary depending on vehicle reload mechanics.

A vehicle is Immobilized when one or more of its tracks are broken. An Immobilized vehicle either cannot move at all or can only rotate, depending on which track is damaged. Wheeled vehicles cannot be Immobilized.

The aiming circle in the center of the screen demonstrates gun accuracy by showing the area within which a projectile may land. The aiming point is selected randomly within the circle: the smaller the circle, the higher the weapon's accuracy.
Significantly enhances engine performance: doubles acceleration speed, increases speed in Boost mode, accelerates Boost Energy regeneration, and grants complete Slow resistance.
A temporary burst of speed activated by pressing or holding the Left Shift key.
Armor is distributed across the front, sides, and rear of a vehicle—covering both the hull and gun—and helps reduce the amount of damage it sustains in combat.
Modules located inside the vehicle's hull or turret. Damage to internal modules increases status buildup, leading to negative status effects.
Modules located on the outside of the vehicle's hull and turret, such as tracks and additional armor.
Vulnerable areas of a vehicle that can receive critical hits: the fuel tank, engine, and ammo rack.
An internal module that determines the vehicle's Boost Energy and total fuel capacity. Critical hits to the fuel tank increase Fire buildup, while its destruction triggers Burning.
An internal module that determines overall vehicle speed and acceleration. Critical hits to the engine increase Slow buildup, while its destruction makes the vehicle Slowed.
Points earned in the Agent Progression that can be spent to unlock or upgrade Agent Skills. Enhance Skills' combat effectiveness or modify the Agent's Ultimate, Trait, or vehicle abilities.
Player actions in battle that grant XP. Include damaging enemy vehicles, capturing objectives, assisting allies, and other effective combat activities.

Used to activate Agent Skills in battle. Can be earned by performing effective battle actions such as destroying enemy vehicles, capturing objectives, and blocking damage, and are reduced if the player's vehicle is destroyed.
Skills modify an Agent's Ultimate, Trait, or vehicle abilities. They activate depending on the number of Skill Activation Points earned in battle.
Upgrades or alterations that can be applied to vehicles to change their parameters or behavior in combat. Modules can improve accuracy, damage, and fire rate, or add unique effects.

Upgrades or alterations to vehicle abilities that change their parameters, effectiveness, or behavior in battle. Modifiers can reduce ability cooldowns, increase damage, expand the area of effect, or add extra effects.
Positive or negative effects on vehicles that only activate when certain conditions are met.
The waiting period after a vehicle or Agent ability is used. Abilities are unavailable during cooldown.
Vehicle or Agent abilities may be interrupted for various reasons: by player request, upon ability expiration, or when the vehicle is affected by an ability-interrupting effect.
Aiming while a vehicle or Agent ability is active. Typically changes camera position and adds interface elements to aid aiming.

Passive abilities that provide a constant effect in battle without requiring player activation. Traits shape the Agent's core playstyle by enhancing their attributes, modifying their behavior on the battlefield, or granting bonuses.

An Agent's most powerful skill, delivering a significant advantage or unique action in battle. Ultimates may enhance weapons, increase survivability, create tactical opportunities, or affect opponents. Can be activated after accumulating 100% Ultimate Energy.

Vehicle abilities give tanks a temporary advantage or unique action in battle. They may enhance weapons, increase survivability, create tactical opportunities, or affect opponents. Abilities are activated using Energy.

Higher damage potential than standard HE shells, with no damage falloff and consistent damage regardless of penetration. Follows realistic ballistics, can deal splash damage to multiple targets, and causes increased damage to external modules like tracks, additional armor, and shield armor. Typically used by autocannons with a high rate of fire.
Higher damage potential but lower penetration than standard AP shells, with each hit dealing small but guaranteed damage. Typically used by autocannons with a high rate of fire.
Higher damage potential but lower penetration than standard AP shells. Typically used by autocannons with a high rate of fire.

ATGM HEAT shells have lower penetration and a shallower post-penetration damage cone depth, but deal higher base damage and have a wider penetration cone with more rays. This means they have poorer damage application than standard HEAT shells overall, especially against internal modules, but offer a higher and more consistent damage output.

Lower penetration than other ATGM shells, but high-explosive characteristics make it a reliable source of damage. Excels at dealing damage to heavily armored targets and destroying tracks to control enemy movement.
An object that can be deployed onto the battlefield to provide an advantage. Placeables may enhance defense, block routes, deal damage to enemies, or serve support functions.
Physical damage dealt or taken when a vehicle collides with another vehicle or object.
Consumable items that are activated either manually by the player or automatically when certain conditions are met. All equipment provides a benefit in battle and has a cooldown.
Explosive damage distributed over an area—typically a circle, with its radius measured in meters—and capable of affecting multiple vehicles. Most effective against external modules.
The method used to load and fire shells.
Guns with single-shot mechanics require a reload after every shell fired.
The vehicle's gun is equipped with a magazine that automatically loads the next shell after each shot. Once the magazine is emptied, a longer reload is required.
The gun can fire multiple shells in quick succession, building heat with each shot. If it overheats, it cannot fire again until fully cooled. Heat dissipates over time when not firing.
An overheated gun must fully cool down before it can fire again.
The vehicle's gun is equipped with a magazine that automatically loads the next shell after each shot.

The gun is equipped with a magazine and can fire shells in bursts, discharging multiple rounds in quick succession. Each shell fired increases recoil and reduces accuracy. Each burst is followed by a short reload, while emptying the magazine triggers a longer one.
Hitscan projectiles travel at such extreme velocity that their impact with a target is registered instantly upon firing.
Projectiles with straight-line ballistics travel in a straight line and are not affected by gravity.
Projectiles with realistic ballistics travel in an arc due to their limited velocity, rather than following a straight-line path.

Different shell types vary in effectiveness depending on factors such as distance to the target, target armor, and playstyle. For example, AP shells offer strong penetration and damage at close range, while HE shells have no damage or penetration falloff but are less effective against heavily armored vehicles.
The most common shell type. Offers strong damage and penetration at close range, but both ​​decrease rapidly over distance.

No damage falloff and consistent damage regardless of penetration. Can inflict splash damage on multiple targets. Follow realistic ballistics and deal increased damage to external modules like tracks, additional armor, and shield armor.

Strong damage and penetration values, with each hit dealing small but guaranteed damage. Can also deal splash damage and cause increased damage to external modules like tracks, additional armor, and shield armor.
Average damage and penetration values, with no falloff for either. Faster than HE and ATGM shells, but slower than AP, making precision hits on moving targets more difficult.
Fires multiple pellets in a single shot, offering extremely high damage potential at close range. Low penetration, with rapid damage and penetration falloff over distance.
Same damage and penetration values as regular AP shells, but no penetration falloff due to guided-missile ballistics. Slower than standard AP shells and can be harder to use effectively.
An internal module where ammunition is stored and supplied. Critical damage to the ammo rack has visible consequences.

The crew occupies the vehicle's crew compartment, an internal module where they are protected while fulfilling their duties. Critical damage to the crew increases the Daze status, while the crew's destruction applies the Dazed status effect.
Limited-use external plating that provides extra protection from damage. Once it is destroyed, the vehicle's original armor is exposed. Repairs automatically when HP is fully restored.
Additional armor that neutralizes a significant amount of incoming damage, but can easily be destroyed by small-caliber weapons or explosions.
An external module that gives the vehicle traction, enabling movement and steering. When tracks are destroyed, the vehicle is Immobilized, but can still fire and use abilities.
A shell strike on a vehicle, regardless of whether it penetrates armor or deals damage.
A shell strike on a vehicle's critical zone that causes significant damage.
The amount of damage a projectile deals upon penetrating an enemy vehicle's armor.
A projectile's ability to penetrate vehicle armor. If the penetration value exceeds the target vehicle's armor thickness, the shot penetrates and deals damage.
The rate at which the aiming circle shrinks to its minimum size. The faster the aiming speed, the faster the gun reaches maximum accuracy.
The speed at which vehicle ability Energy is restored.
The rate at which a vehicle's hit points are restored.
The higher a vehicle's engine power, the faster it can reach its top speed.
The top speed a vehicle can reach when moving forward.
The top speed a vehicle can reach while moving in reverse.
Each gear has a specific ratio that determines its acceleration characteristics. Higher gear ratios provide better acceleration off the line, but limit top speed on straight stretches.
The reduction in a shell's penetration as it travels over distance.
The reduction in a shell's damage as it travels over distance.
Sniper mode, also known as the Aim Down Sights (ADS) mechanic, is activated by right-clicking. It narrows the camera’s Field of View (FoV) and magnifies the target area for more precise aiming.
A bright blue-white indicator shown when an enemy is aiming down their sights at the player.

Damage that affects multiple targets within a defined area. Typically caused by explosives, abilities, or environmental effects. Can be used to control space, pressure groups of opponents, or punish clustered enemies.
Reduces main gun reload time by *-25%* (*-40%* for a perfect spot).
Increases track repair time by *2s* for *10s*. A Repair Kit removes the effect.

Events are special occurrences that temporarily influence the course of battle in certain modes. They may change battle rules, introduce new objectives, empower certain players or teams, or create unique situations that force players to adapt.

The primary goal of a game mode that defines what teams or players must do to achieve victory. Objectives may include capturing points, holding territory, escorting objects, or completing other actions that shape the strategy and flow of battle.
A vehicle's return to battle after its destruction, allowing the player to rejoin combat. Respawn happens after a short delay at designated locations on the map.

The elimination of a player's vehicle by an enemy or other combat factors. Depending on the game mode, the destruction of the player's vehicle may result in temporary downtime (respawn) and impact the balance between teams. Destructions are recorded in the battle statistics.

An action by a player that helps eliminate an enemy, but is not the final blow. Assists can be earned by dealing damage, using abilities, or otherwise helping a teammate secure a kill. Assists are recorded in the battle statistics and reflect the player's contribution to the team's performance.

The successful elimination of an enemy vehicle by a player. Kills grant XP and resources, and may give other advantages or influence the course of battle. They serve as a measure of the player's combat effectiveness and are recorded in the battle statistics.
A soft visual barrier that obscures targets from view, and makes it harder to see inside and past them.
A hard physical barrier that obscures targets from view, preventing sources from gathering data on them.
A source's ability to efficiently gather data on targets. Optics ratings vary between vehicles and can be upgraded when leveling up.
Actions performed by a target that provide data to a source without needing the target to be in view.
Actions performed by targets that allow a source to gather data on a target without the target being in their active or passive view.

A sphere around the vehicle's hull, within which data on enemy targets performing audible actions is gathered. These actions are not blocked by terrain and automatically trigger data on a source if the target performs them within range.
A cone extending from the turret of the vehicle, within which data is gathered on enemy targets to support information gathering in the player's periphery.
The line along which the vehicle's gun is pointing, where data on enemy targets is rapidly gathered.
A reconnaissance resource gathered by sources on enemy targets to acquire battle information. Having data on a target is required to spot it.
A ray cast from the source to the target vehicle. Line-of-sight checks ensure the source can see the target before performing certain actions, such as firing the main gun.
Spotted vehicles are visible to the player and display basic HUD information.

Caution: weak spot! Vulnerable to critical hits. Sufficient lethal damage to the engine will slow the vehicle down. The duration and susceptibility can be reduced by increasing the vehicle's Slow resistance.
Makes the vehicle invisible to Thermal Imager.
*+10%* to aiming speed, *-20%* to reticle size while moving, and *+10%* to turret traverse speed.
*+20%* resistance to all incoming critical damage.
Grants bonus HP recovery of *10* HP/s.
Damage that ignores all forms of defense.
*-10%* to main gun reload time and *+5%* to damage.
*+10%* to engine power and *+15%* to hull traverse speed.
Each hit reduces reload time by *10%*, stacking up to *5* times. Each stack lasts *15s*.

A vehicle progression and balancing mechanic that defines the maximum amount of power (or weight) points available for installing modules on a vehicle. Each module consumes a fixed number of capacity points, and the total cost of all installed modules cannot exceed the vehicle's capacity limit.
Contaminates the vehicle, dealing minor damage over time and preventing it from restoring HP. Radiation resistance reduces Irradiated duration.
Sets the vehicle's systems on fire, dealing damage over time. Fire resistance reduces Burning duration.

Disrupts the vehicle's mechanical power systems, decreasing its mobility. Slow status builds up through damage to the engine, certain shells and abilities, and contact with Slow areas. At maximum Slow buildup, the Slowed status effect is applied.

Disrupts the vehicle's electronic systems. Interference status builds up through contact with Interference areas, damage to the vehicle's electronics, and certain shells and abilities. At maximum Interference buildup, the Jammed status effect is applied.

Prevents the vehicle from making repairs. Radiation status builds up through contact with Radiation areas and certain shells and abilities. At maximum Radiation buildup, the Irradiated status effect is applied.

Heats the vehicle's flammable components. Fire status builds up through contact with Fire areas, critical damage to the fuel tank, or certain shells and abilities. At maximum Fire buildup, the Burning status effect is applied.
A vehicle's capability to withstand status buildup. High resistance to a specific status slows its buildup and causes active status effects to decay faster.
Areas that cause vehicles inside them to build up status. Status effects from world effect zones deal damage that only affects enemy vehicles.

Temporary positive or negative modifiers applied to vehicles when status buildup reaches its maximum. Status effects last a set time and prevent further buildup of the associated status. Multiple status effects can be active on the same vehicle at one time.
Status builds up over time. When it reaches its maximum, the corresponding status effect is applied. If buildup stops, status gradually decays.

An indicator of how close a vehicle is to receiving a status effect. For example, a hit to a vehicle's fuel tank builds up the Fire status, while repeat hits will increase Fire to its maximum and inflict the Burning status effect.
Used to increase Account Level. Account Points can be earned through various actions: leveling up a vehicle awards a small amount, while purchasing one grants significantly more.

Reflects a player's overall progress in the game. Account level is increased through actions such as purchasing vehicles and progression modules, leveling up vehicles and Agents, and unlocking game content.
An in-game currency that can be purchased for real money. HEAT-Coins can be exchanged for Credits or used to purchase in-game items.
An in-game currency earned in battles and used to purchase vehicle modules.
An in-game currency required to complete seasonal Battle Passes. Can be earned in battles and by completing missions.
The main in-game currency, used to purchase vehicles and customization items. Mainly earned in battles and Battle Pass.
An Agent's level represents their combat experience and increases with XP earned. Leveling up unlocks new Agent Skills that enhance the Agent's effectiveness in battle.
Vehicle XP advances a vehicle's level and unlocks new modules. It can be earned through actions including destructions, assists, capturing objectives, and other contributions in battle.
A vehicle's level represents its experience in combat and increases with XP earned. Leveling up unlocks new vehicle modules that enhance its effectiveness and expand gameplay variety.
Advances an Agent's level and unlocks new Agent Skills. Can be earned through actions including destructions, assists, capturing objectives, and other contributions in battle.
Rendered vehicles are visible to the player, but do not display any HUD information.
A hostile entity that provides information to enemies. Targets may be enemy vehicles or placeables such as Deadzone Gerät.
An entity that gathers information on targets. Sources may be vehicles or deployed abilities, such as Recon Probe.

A vehicle controlled by another player—or AI in certain modes—that belongs to the same team as the player. Allies help achieve shared objectives, provide support in battle, and cooperate to gain an advantage or secure victory.
A vehicle controlled by another player—or AI in certain modes—that belongs to the opposing team and poses a threat to the player. Neutralize enemies to gain an advantage in battle or secure victory.
An electronic warfare zone. Interference areas jam vehicle electronics and build up the Interference status, followed by the Jammed status effect.

A puddle of flammable liquid that reduces the friction of any vehicle it touches. Vehicles travelling through Grease areas may lose grip and slide out of control. Grease areas cannot form on water, and contact with fire turns them into Fire areas.
A toxic zone where vehicles receive the Radiation status, which leads to the Irradiated status effect.
A cloud of smoke that obscures vehicles within it. Smoke areas neutralize Fire areas on contact, remove the Burning status effect, and accelerate Fire status decay.

A burning zone with a Smoke area on top of it. Unlike Fire areas, Napalm areas cannot be extinguished by water or smoke. Contact with a Napalm area builds up the Fire status, which leads to the Burning status effect.
A burning zone on the battlefield. Contact with a Fire area builds up the Fire status, which leads to the Burning status effect. If placed on water, a Fire area is replaced by a Smoke area.
*-6%* to damage taken by Warded vehicles. Can stack up to 5 times.
Makes vehicles *15%* easier to penetrate. Can stack up to 5 times.
Vulnerable vehicles suffer reduced performance, lowering their resistance to statuses and accelerating status buildup.
Applied upon contact with grease. Reduces friction in the vehicle's mechanical systems, making it harder to control, prone to sliding on slopes, and vulnerable to Fire.
When a vehicle is submerged in water, a countdown begins, after which it is abandoned and destroyed. Drowning also immediately removes the Burning status effect.
Applied when a vehicle has been in contact with water, causing it to interact differently with certain effects. Wet vehicles are resistant to Fire and vulnerable to Interference.
Conceals the vehicle from hostile detection systems, hiding its marker from opponents and immediately making it unspotted.
Disrupts the vehicle's mechanical power systems, limiting its mobility. Slow resistance reduces Slowed duration.
Shocks the vehicle's crew, preventing the use of abilities. Interference resistance reduces Jammed duration.
